description: Self-improving trading bot - Fix bugs and optimize until profitable

userStories.title: Add time-based refresh to Nado Grid MM
userStories.description: Add periodic refresh (every 5 minutes) to ensure orders and spread stay fresh regardless of fills or price movement.
acceptanceCriteria: Add last_refresh_time tracking variable
Refresh orders if >5 minutes since last placement
Move _calculate_dynamic_spread() call OUTSIDE of _place_grid_orders() so spread updates every status cycle
Log shows 'Time-based refresh' when triggered
Syntax check passes: python3 -m py_compile scripts/grid_mm_nado_v8.py
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-01-22: Added v15 time-based refresh + spread updates every cycle

userStories.title: Add time-based refresh to Paradex Grid MM
userStories.description: Apply same time-based refresh to Paradex to prevent stale orders sitting far from market.
acceptanceCriteria: Add last_refresh_time tracking variable
Refresh orders if >5 minutes since last placement
Log shows 'Time-based refresh' when triggered
Syntax check passes: python3 -m py_compile scripts/grid_mm_live.py
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-01-22: Added v15 time-based refresh. Also fixed await in non-async syntax errors.

userStories.title: Add stale order detection
userStories.description: Detect when existing orders are too far from current mid price and refresh them immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate distance of tracked orders from current mid price
If any order is >0.2% from mid, trigger immediate refresh
Log shows 'Stale order refresh: order at $X is Y% from mid'
Apply to both Nado and Paradex scripts

userStories.title: Reduce spread in calm markets
userStories.description: When volatility is very low (ROC < 2bps for sustained period), tighten spread to increase fill probability.
acceptanceCriteria: Track consecutive low-ROC cycles (ROC < 2bps)
After 2 minutes of low ROC, reduce spread by 20%
Log shows 'TIGHT_SPREAD mode: spread reduced to Xbps'
Revert to normal spread when ROC increases above 5bps
Add test case to tests/test_dynamic_spread.py

userStories.title: Inventory rebalancing for stuck positions
userStories.description: When at 100% inventory for extended period with 0 fills, use market order to rebalance.
acceptanceCriteria: Track time at max inventory (>=95%)
After 10 minutes at max inventory with 0 fills, close 25% of position via market order
Log shows 'Inventory rebalance: closing 25% position at $X'
Limit to once per hour maximum
Only apply to Nado (DEX liquidity issue)
userStories.notes: Nado had 100% inventory for entire 1-hour monitoring period

userStories.title: Add momentum confirmation to LLM scoring
userStories.description: Enhance v9 scoring by requiring 5-minute momentum to confirm LLM direction before entering.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate 5-minute price momentum before entry
Require momentum direction matches LLM direction (both bullish or both bearish)
Log momentum value in trade decision output
Track and document win rate change in progress.txt

userStories.title: Implement trailing stop for winning trades
userStories.description: Lock in profits by trailing stop loss as position moves in our favor.
acceptanceCriteria: When P&L > 4%, move stop loss to breakeven (entry price)
When P&L > 6%, trail stop at (current P&L - 2%)
Log trailing stop adjustments in fast_exit_monitor
Add trailing_stop_pct field to position tracking

userStories.title: Create automated performance tracker
userStories.description: Script to measure hourly performance metrics and log them for analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/track_performance.py
Track: fills/hour, volume/hour, P&L/hour per bot
Write metrics to logs/performance_metrics.json with timestamps
Can be run via cron every hour
Include bot identifier (nado, paradex, hibachi_grid, hibachi_llm)

userStories.title: Parameter optimization framework
userStories.description: Framework to test different parameter sets and measure/compare results.
acceptanceCriteria: Create config/grid_mm_variants.json with parameter sets to test
Scripts read active variant from config
Log which variant is active in each status line
Performance tracker records variant ID with metrics
Document recommended parameters in progress.txt after testing

userStories.title: Final integration and documentation
userStories.description: Apply best parameters from testing, run 24-hour validation, update all documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PROGRESS.md with final optimized configuration
Update LEARNINGS.md with optimization results and key findings
All bots running with optimized parameters
24-hour test shows positive or breakeven P&L (document actual result)
Remove experimental/debug logging if any
